raw_consumer_statement: Transfer of " interests '' by XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX Salesman on XXXX XXXX, 2024 who showed me a contract that showed charge of {$23000.00} for consoladitated loan which included an {$11000.00} principal from a prior loan. I understood that the AMEX credit card issued to me was to pay off that loan. Phone communications with finance dept at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX stated that the {$24000.00} charge put on the AMEX card had nothing to do with that loan. Thus I contacted AMEX to dispute the charge to explain what the charge was for. All they sent me was a copy of the contract which only had the {$23000.00} charge and a line of numbers representing " interests. '' They dropped my dispute and so I issued another dispute for the {$23000.00} wanting an explanation for both charges. Again they dropped the dispute without giving me any new information. I wrote a certified demand letter to the XXXX Owners office and copy to the XXXX XXXX 7th floor sales office -- -- and have gotten NO response ( XX/XX/XXXX, and on XX/XX/XXXX ). The bunch of numbers representing interests -- include transfered insterests -- - so what exactly did they sell me and how do they value it to be over {$35000.00} which includes the AMEX charge and the XXXX in the loan? How can they sell and charge me something without explaining it? I was simply told that they would be decreasing my maintenance fees! They cheated me and LIED to me! AMEX says that they will not supply the info to them.
